text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #3)

> … Colin Percival, author of the originally linked review comment, …

For clarity, here's relevant part of the comment: 

>> … I approve the designation of 13.2 as production and 12.4/13.1 as legacy.

– and he's Deputy Lead of the Primary Release Engineering Team, so I'd like to (also) gain guidance from him.
